name: Cheshire Robinhood Agents skill suite
description: First-class agent skills for Robinhood Chain registries, Agent Forge, dual-rail omni mint (Solana+RH+zk-omni), bonded launch, Launchpad V3, and zk-omni messaging. Hosted under robinhood-agents/skills and served via /api/skills when the monorepo is scanned.

notes.rh-crypto-agent: Pack root (pack-index.json + nested skills); not a single SKILL.md. Nested skills are scanned recursively.
